title: OR Music
description: A resource pack that adds music to Origin realms!
body:
### **INFO**

**OR Music is a simple pack for Origin Realms that adds biome based music and random biome music to certain OR biomes.**

---

### **Dependencies**

Keep in mind that **OR Music requires** any version (as for now) of [**Biome Music**](https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-music) to work.

---

## **Included Themes**

1. [Spawn Theme.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=McKTbntEShA)
2. [Depths Theme.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HMybOIhxfEs)
3. [Blighted Theme.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yioL2A_KP00)
4. [Lush Caves Theme.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JW6Zi64tmtg)
5. [Cave Theme.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gW9hdkWVejA) (Credits to Lowresbonus).
